summary: Complete frontend testing of detailed analysis features - ALL 13 FEATURES VERIFIED. Analysis page shows correct stats (3 Partidos, 92 Puntos, Victorias 3-0, Games 6-0), Efectividad de Puntos with comparison bar, 3 court heatmaps (blue/purple/orange), Top 5 Motivos with split bars, and Partidos Analizados. Match Detail page has working tabs (Todos, G1, G2, Stats) with Top 5 Motivos visual bars and Resultados por Juego.
passed_tests: Analysis page: select 2 players (Mari and Juan) and click Analyze
Analysis shows stats: 3 Partidos, 92 Puntos Totales
Analysis shows Efectividad de Puntos: Mari 75 points (82%), Juan 17 points (18%) with comparison bar
Analysis shows 3 court heatmaps: Mari (blue, 75 puntos), Todos (purple, 92 puntos), Juan (orange, 17 puntos) with point counts per zone
Analysis shows Top 5 Motivos de Punto with split bars (blue/orange) - Dos paredes (31), Cruzada (25), Stroke (14), Nick (8), Chapa (4)
Analysis shows Partidos Analizados section with 3 matches and dates (7 feb, 10 feb, 11 feb 2026)
Date pickers open calendar (shadcn component) and close correctly after date selection
Navigate to Partidos page and click on a match to open Match Detail
Match Detail: Tabs include Todos, G1, G2, Stats - all working correctly
Match Detail Stats tab: shows Top 5 Motivos with visual bars (green/red) - Dos paredes, Stroke, Cruzada, Nick, Chapa
Match Detail Stats tab: shows Efectividad de Puntos with percentages (67%/33%) and comparison bar
Match Detail Stats tab: shows Resultados por Juego (Juego 1: 15-13, Juego 2: 11-0)
seed_data_creation: None - using existing external API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All detailed analysis features verified working. Analysis page displays: stats grid (3 Partidos, 92 Puntos Totales, 3-0 Victorias, 6-0 Games), Efectividad de Puntos with blue/orange bar, 3 court heatmaps (4x6 grid) with point counts per zone, Top 5 Motivos de Punto with split bars showing player breakdown, and Partidos Analizados list. Match Detail page has working game filter tabs (Todos, G1, G2, Stats) with Stats tab showing: match summary, Efectividad de Puntos (green/red bar), Top 5 Motivos with visual bars, and Resultados por Juego. Date pickers use shadcn calendar and close automatically after selection.

efectividad_de_puntos.comparison_bar: blue for Mari, orange for Juan

heatmaps.grid: 4 cols x 6 rows with point counts per zone

top5_motivos.split_bars: blue for Mari, orange for Juan with individual counts

stats_tab.top5_motivos: Dos paredes, Stroke, Cruzada, Nick, Chapa with green (won) and red (lost) bars

date_pickers.date_display: Shows selected date text (e.g., '15 de febrero de 2026')
